title: Create: Chains from Copper
description: Adds a crafting recipe to create chains from copper.
body:
## Create: Chains from Copper
This is a very simple datapack that adds 1 crafting recipe.

To make a chain from copper, make a chain as you would normally but with copper nuggets and ingot instead of iron or zinc.

<details>
<summary>Crafting recipe</summary>

![Recipe for chain using copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3c0f562d36dc51fd0315d2560a96efd3827c3d.png)

</details>
